---
title: "Datensatz-Präsentation Gruppe 2"
subtitle: "COVID-19 Mortalität & strukturelle Einflussfaktoren"
author: "Maximilian Elixhauser"
date: today
format:
  PrettyPDF-pdf:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          \usepackage{fvextra}
          \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{
            breaklines,
            breaksymbolleft={},
            commandchars=\\\{\}
          }
code-fold: true
echo: false
message: false
warning: false
---
